title: The Call
why_this_song: The Call by Backstreet Boys (2000) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "So, don't stay up and wait for me, okay?"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'm sorry, listen, I'm gonna be late tonight"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Listen, if you can hear me, we're going to a place nearby, alright?"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Listen, if you can hear me, we're going to a place nearby, alright?"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Hi, it's me, what's up, baby?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

'Bout the call that changed my destiny
Me and my boys went out

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "listen" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hi, it's me, what's up, baby?
Just because I made that call and lied

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm sorry, listen, I'm gonna be late tonight
One of my friends found out

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "The Call" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "The Call"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Backstreet Boys one question about "The Call", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Backstreet Boys sobre "The Call", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Call" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Call" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
